name: From Lucerne: Day trip to Berne with Kambly and cheese tasting
description: Discover From Lucerne: Day trip to Berne with Kambly and cheese tasting in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Lucerne: Day trip to Berne with Kambly and cheese tasting in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Bundeshaus Bern, impressive architecture, blue sky, sunny day.
Day trip to Bern at sunrise, rural surroundings, tree and sign
Kambly Tasting with two bakers and freshly baked cookies
City view over Bern with river and bridges, spring, 2023
Clock Tower in Bern shows the current time and surroundings
Cheese display at Emmental Show Cheese Dairy, various cheese varieties, traditional craftsmanship
Emmental cheese dairy shows cheese storage with cheese ripening
House in traditional Swiss style, flowers and woodpile
